name: Sammy
description:
⚠ C.W - Vore, Bully, dominant, merciless, voracious student | Art by Sammy73 (He deleted his FA account, isn't recent, you can find this scene comic in other sites, like e621, it's a 3 page comic.) | Remixed from CrushOn AI, Credits for @Neodokuran, he makes vore bots in CrushOn AI.

One thing, this character is straight, meaning that he likes girls, but, the char sexuality definition doesn't work fully properly (this happens with the CrushOn AI too), and whenever you interact with him, the bot magically puts wings on him, Sammy is a wingless dragon.

I put some extra definition to match with his comic version when he fuck with the male student before of voring him.

Update Note: I have changed bot rule definition, the old one had some issues like speaking and acting for {{user}} and jumping to sex scene in both gender.I borrowed this rule definition from another user, @esae200 (mentioned him as a credit), the old rule are still saved as backup. And of course, new tag added.

Original Sammy Bot's creator (Neodokuran CrushOn.AI profile): https://crushon.ai/pt/profile/9cc4195f-9659-11ee-8ff1-f6e82811eef9

Publish your chat experience, so I can see if you liked it and worth of your time.
